confirmed_topics.rationale: Highest topic_id overlap (4 matches). +102% growth = doubling. Maps directly to somatic_healing topic_id and bridges into anxiety, burnout, grief. Consumer language alignment: 'my body holds all my stress', 'shaking and releasing things', 'nervous system is fried'. Bridge language ready.
Highest volume of all tracked topics. Growth slowing (+37%) = mature topic. Good evergreen content target. Maps to anxiety, overthinking, grief. Not a spike — no urgency.

4 topic_id matches like somatic-therapy. +75% growth solid. Natural pairing with somatic-therapy content. Consumer language: 'can't breathe right because of stress', 'my nervous system is fried'. Slight recent dip — publish while interest rebounds.

Explosive +1243% growth but this is a specific AI product (journaling app), not a therapy modality. Only 2 topic_id matches. Competitor signal — indicates consumer appetite for AI-guided self-reflection. Content angle: 'AI journaling for overthinkers' positioned with Phoenix bridge language. Monitor, don't chase the brand name.

High volume (201K) but only 2 topic_id matches. Platform risk: medical content triggers. Had massive spike mid-2025 now stabilized. Bridge language approach ONLY — no clinical claims. Not a fast-publish target due to compliance risk.

discovery_scan.note: No new self-help/wellness/therapy/mental health topics with >1000% growth discovered. Health dominated by PDRN skincare, pharma (Retatrutide), AI tech. Lifestyle dominated by consumer products. Some topics hidden behind PRO paywall.
